description: A vendor who bid on a contract wants to know if a decision has been made.

nodes.task_description: Identify the vendor and the specific contract they bid on.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the contract in the procurement system.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the contract award.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the contract has been awarded to another vendor.

nodes.task_description: Inform the vendor of the outcome. If public, provide the name of the winning vendor and the award amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the decision to the vendor.
